text.more:
This retweet network graph shows "Authority Hubs" or the users, whose tweet content is getting viral during the 2026 LPG Crisis. 
In an information diffusion graph, these users act as major sources of information or content creators.
text.intro:
A retweet network graph that shows information dissemination during the 2026 LPG Crisis in India. 
Node size is proportional to the indegree of nodes or in other words,  the more a tweet gets retweeted, the more is the indegree/ node size.
text.title: Retweet Network Graph (based on Indegree)
